circular_title: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
circular_summary: Invoice Management System mandatory from April 1, 2026 for all GST filers.
actions: Implement the new Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST compliance from April 1, 2026
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
email_body:
{
  "subject": "GST Advisory: Implementation of New Invoice Management System (IMS) for Spice Garden Restaurant",
  "body": "Dear Suresh Pillai, 

As a food and beverage establishment, Spice Garden Restaurant is required to comply with the new GST regulations, specifically the implementation of the Invoice Management System (IMS) to ensure accurate and timely GST returns. This applies to your business as it involves the generation of invoices for taxable supplies.

To ensure compliance, please take the following actions:
1. Implement the new Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST compliance from April 1, 2026.

The deadline for implementation is April 1, 2026. Given the high risk level associated with non-compliance, we urge you to prioritize this implementation to avoid potential penalties.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require assistance with implementing the new IMS. We are committed to supporting your business in maintaining GST compliance.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: Cross-check with client's current invoicing system and ensure seamless integration with the new IMS, verify compliance with GST regulations
